13:
SELECT *
            FROM (
                SELECT DISTINCT s.phone
                FROM schools s
JOIN satscores sc ON s.cdscode = sc.cds
WHERE sc.numtsttakr > 0
            ) sub
            ORDER BY (sc.numge1500::REAL / sc.numtsttakr::REAL) DESC
 LIMIT 3;
325:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT m."molecule_id")
FROM "molecule" m
JOIN "atom" a ON m."molecule_id" = a."molecule_id"
WHERE m."label" = '+'
  AND LOWER(a."element") = 'n';
279:
SELECT DISTINCT m."label"
FROM "bond" b
JOIN "molecule" m ON b."molecule_id" = m."molecule_id"
WHERE b."bond_id" = 'TR001_10_11';
276:
SELECT DISTINCT
    c."atom_id",
    c."atom_id2"
FROM "connected" c
JOIN "bond" b ON c."bond_id" = b."bond_id"
WHERE b."bond_type" = '#';
498:
SELECT DISTINCT st.translation
FROM set_translations st
JOIN cards c ON c.setcode = st.setcode
JOIN foreign_data fd ON fd.uuid = c.uuid
WHERE fd.name ILIKE '%Tendo Ice Bridge%'
  AND st.language = 'French';
345:
SELECT DISTINCT c."name", l."status"
FROM cards c
JOIN legalities l ON c."uuid" = l."uuid"
WHERE c."types" = 'Artifact'
  AND c."side" IS NULL
  AND l."format" = 'vintage';
1533:
SELECT "c"."customerid", "ym"."consumption"
FROM "customers" "c"
JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT "t"."customerid"
    FROM "transactions_1k" "t"
    WHERE "t"."productid" = 5
      AND ("t"."price" / "t"."amount") > 29.00
) "qualifying_customers" ON "c"."customerid" = "qualifying_customers"."customerid"
JOIN "yearmonth" "ym" ON "c"."customerid" = "ym"."customerid"
WHERE "ym"."date" = '201208';
1480:
SELECT 
    SUBSTRING(ym."date" FROM 5 FOR 2) AS "month",
    SUM(ym."consumption") AS "total_consumption"
FROM "yearmonth" ym
JOIN "customers" c ON ym."customerid" = c."customerid"
WHERE c."segment" LIKE 'SME'
  AND ym."date" LIKE '2013%'
GROUP BY "month"
ORDER BY "total_consumption" DESC
LIMIT 1;
1529:
SELECT
    SUM(t."amount" * t."price") AS total_spent_all,
    SUM(CASE WHEN t."date" >= '2012-01-01' AND t."date" < '2012-02-01' THEN t."amount" * t."price" ELSE 0 END) AS total_spent_jan2012
FROM transactions_1k t
WHERE t."customerid" = 38508;
589: SELECT "id" FROM "users" WHERE "reputation" = (SELECT MAX("reputation") FROM "users") ORDER BY "id" ASC LIMIT 1;
1365:
SELECT DISTINCT e."expense_description"
FROM "expense" e
JOIN "budget" b ON e."link_to_budget" = b."budget_id"
WHERE b."remaining" = (SELECT MIN("remaining") FROM "budget");
1359:
SELECT 
    SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name LIKE '%Yearly Kickoff%' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END)::numeric / 
    NULLIF(SUM(CASE WHEN e.event_name LIKE '%October Meeting%' THEN b.amount ELSE 0 END), 0)::numeric AS times_more
FROM budget b
JOIN event e ON b.link_to_event = e.event_id
WHERE b.category = 'Advertisement';
